name: Mountain Crest Acquisition Corp. V
business: Mountain Crest Acquisition Corp. V is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. As of the filing date, the company has not completed any business combination and has no operating revenues. The company intends to identify and acquire a business with untapped opportunity for building a public company, focusing on private companies in North America and Asia Pacific regions (excluding China).
